changeSet.author: nexus-mf447
changeSet.comment: Enable pgvector (vector type, HNSW/IVFFlat operators) and pg_trgm (trigram similarity)
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector; CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;
changeSet.rollback: DROP EXTENSION IF EXISTS pg_trgm; DROP EXTENSION IF EXISTS vector;

changeSet.author: nexus-mf447
changeSet.comment: chunks_384: tenant-isolated pgvector table for 384-dimension embeddings (e.g. MiniLM)
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.chunks_384 CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-mf447
changeSet.comment: chunks_768: tenant-isolated pgvector table for 768-dimension embeddings
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.chunks_768 CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-mf447
changeSet.comment: chunks_1024: tenant-isolated pgvector table for 1024-dimension embeddings (Voyage AI)
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.chunks_1024 CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-mf447
changeSet.comment: Enable and FORCE RLS; create tenant_isolation policy on chunks_384, chunks_768, chunks_1024

changeSet.author: nexus-mf447
changeSet.comment: Add nullable collection column to catalog_document_chunks for pgvector routing (RDR-155 P1.2)
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS nexus.idx_catalog_chunks_collection; ALTER TABLE nexus.catalog_document_chunks DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS collection;
